media_path: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon\04 Modeling Tools - Intro.mp4

items.text: 好了，现在让我们试着构建场景，并简要介绍一下建模工具。 All right, so now let's try to block out our scene and have a brief introduction into the modeling tools. 因此，让我们激活建模模式。如果没有看到，请进入插件文件夹，输入 So let's activate modeling mode. If you don't see this, you'll have to go to your plugins folder and type in 建模，并具有建模工具编辑器模式。 modeling and this has this modeling tools editor mode. 虽然还处于测试阶段，但这是 Epic 为在引擎内创建所有内容而采取的措施之一。 This is in beta, but this is one of the steps that Epic is taking to have everything created inside of the engine. 您可以在另一个 DCC（如 Maya、Blender 或 Houdini）之间来回切换、 You can go back and forth between another DCC like Maya or Blender or Houdini, 但我认为，虚幻技术最强大的地方在于，你永远不会离开引擎，而 but I think Unreal is that it's most powerful when you're never leaving the engine and 它还有一些非常快速和高质量的 it also has some really fast and high quality 位移工具。让我们来了解一下虚幻中的建模模式。首先，我们有这些不同的原始形状。 displacement tools. So let's learn about the modeling mode inside of Unreal. So starting off, we have these different primitive shapes. 这是我们必须屏蔽掉的场景。 This is the scene that we'll have to block out. 因此，一开始我们只制作一条弯曲的隧道，不需要任何高像素几何细节。 So at first let's just make a curved tunnel without any of this high-res geometry detail. 因此，我们可以在这里创建一个新的圆柱体对象，这样就可以在鼠标所在的位置创建一个圆柱体，它将 So we can go over here and create a new cylinder object and this will create a cylinder wherever our mouse is and it'll 扣在我们的表面。 snap to our surfaces. 因此，让我们点击 "echo "旁边的 "echo"，我们马上就能知道，我们必须增大半径，然后让我们旋转 "echo"。 So let's just click next to echo here and we can tell right away that we'll have to increase our radius and then let's rotate 在我们的绿色 y 轴上，让我们粗略地把它放到合适的位置，这样我们就能知道它需要多大。 this on our green y-axis and let's roughly get this into place so we can tell how big this needs to be. 我认为，就我们的场景而言，这是根据一部动画片改编的，这是 And I think for our scene, this is based off of a cartoon and this is 小女孩拉娅所以我们要改变我们的角色在场景中的比例。 Raya as a young girl. So we're gonna change the proportions of how big our character is going to be in the scene. 但我认为默认设置为 200 会给我们一个好的开始。 But I think setting this to 200 by default will give us a good start. 现在，由于我们在这里进行了旋转，我们可能需要增加高度。 Now because we're rotated here, we'll probably want to increase our height. 因此，让我们从 200 个单位到 1000 个单位，这只是一个区块，所以我们不需要这个气缸的大量分辨率。 So let's go from 200 to a thousand units and it's just a block out so we don't need a ton of resolution out of this cylinder. 但我们可以在这里看到多边形的切面。因此，我们将径向切片加倍到 32，然后按下接受键。 But we can see the faceting of the polygons here. So let's just double our radial slices to 32 and let's press accept. 现在，这将在我们的场景中创建一个新的圆柱体。 And now this will create a new cylinder in our scene. 因此，你可以看到这里创建了一个新的自定义网格。如果我们点击这里的浏览到圆柱体图标、 So you can see here it's created a new custom mesh. If we click the browse to cylinder icon here, 我们将看到它的确切位置，并在生成的文件夹中创建。 we'll see exactly where this is and it'll be created in this generated folder. 因此，现在这样就可以了，但我们要在完成后将这些内容迁移到我们的 assets 文件夹中。 So this is fine for now, but we'll want to migrate these into our assets folder once we're done. 如果你看到缩略图左下方有一个小星星图标，这意味着我们的对象还没有保存。 If you see the little star icon at the bottom left of the thumbnail there, this means that our object hasn't been saved. 出于某种原因，虚幻游戏现在崩溃了。 So for some reason Unreal crashed right now. 这个文件会被删除，我们无法从自动保存中恢复它，除非它首先存在。 This file would be deleted and we couldn't restore it from our autosaves until it exists in the first place. 因此，如果你双击这里的演员，就会打开静态网格菜单。 So if you double click our actor here, this will open up the static mesh menu. 我们只想在这里按 "保存 "键，这样我们就知道万一虚幻崩溃了，这个东西还在这里。 And we just want to press save here so that we know this will still be here in case Unreal crashes. 在导入更多 Quixel 资产时，我们将进一步讨论静态网格编辑器。 We'll talk more about the static mesh editor when we get into importing more Quixel assets. 不过，在静态网格编辑器中要做的主要事情是调整 Nanite 设置、 But the main things you'll be doing inside of the static mesh editor are adjusting your Nanite settings, 在这里指定默认材料。 assigning your default materials up here. 我们将只使用 Nanite。这些 LOD 设置主要用于虚幻 4 及更早版本。 We'll be using Nanite exclusively. These LOD settings were used primarily in Unreal 4 and earlier. 这将根据你离摄像机的距离改变几何体的分辨率。 And this would change the resolution of the geometry based on how far away you are from camera. 但如果您使用的是 Nanite，那么这些 LOD 设置根本不会被使用。 But if you're using Nanite, know that these LOD settings aren't being used at all. 您还将获得光贴图分辨率，该分辨率用于烘焙灯光。 You'll also have your lightmap resolution, which is used when baking your lights. 我们使用的是流明灯和动态灯。所以这是另一件你暂时不用担心的事。 We're using lumen and dynamic lights. So it's another thing that you won't have to worry about for now. 您可能会用到的一种方法是查看紫外线通道。 The one thing you might use is looking at your UV channels. 这就是预览 UV 贴图的方法。我们可以关闭它。 So this is a way to preview our UV maps. So we can close this. 但现在我们需要把它变成一条隧道。 But now we need to make this into a tunnel. 最好的办法就是复制我们的圆柱体，缩小它的尺寸。 And the best way to do that would be duplicating our cylinder, reducing its size. 因此，我要在红色 X 通道和绿色 Y 通道中缩小比例，方法是将鼠标拖到这两个坐标轴之间的绿色和红色细线上。 So I'm going to scale it down in the red X and the green Y channel by dragging my mouse over the thin green and red line in between those two axes. 我将关闭缩放功能，这样我们就可以把它做得更小一些。 I'm going to disable our scale snapping so we can just make it a bit smaller. 我将以 Z 为单位进行缩放。 And I'm going to scale this out in Z. 这是因为我们要做一个简单的布尔运算，用这个圆柱体切出原圆柱体的核心。 And this is because we're going to do a simple Boolean operation where we'll use this cylinder to cut out the core of our original cylinder. 因此，让我们选择原始圆柱体，然后选择第二圆柱体。 So let's select our original cylinder and then select cylinder two. 这将为我们提供网格布尔选项。 And this will give us this mesh Boolean option. 让我们点击一下。 So let's click this. 这样，我们就可以使用一个网格的体积来剪切另一个网格的体积。 And this gives us a couple operations where we can use the volume of one mesh to cut out the volume of another. 在这里，我们可以通过不同的操作来扭转这种情况。 We can reverse this with our different operations here. 但这是我们想要的结果，我们可以接受。 But this is giving us the result we want and we can press accept. 这样就创建了一个新的静态网格。 So this has created a new static mesh. 需要了解的是，这里的建模工具集具有很强的破坏性、 Something to know about the modeling tool set here is it can be very destructive, 也就是说，当你接受任何操作时，它都可以覆盖之前的网格。 meaning that when you accept any operation, it can overwrite the previous mesh. 有时还无法检索到旧信息。 And sometimes it's not possible to retrieve the old information. 因此，如果你担心发生这种情况，不要害怕，只要复制这些网格就可以了，这样你就会更有信心。 So if you're ever worried about this happening, don't be afraid to just duplicate any of these meshes so you have some extra confidence. 同样，每次创建新网格时，默认情况下都不会保存。 And again, every time you create a new mesh, it will not save it by default. 因此，您必须进入并保存静态网格，以确保在虚幻崩溃时不会丢失。 So you'll have to go in and save the static mesh to make sure we don't lose it in case Unreal crashes. 这真是太棒了。 So this is great. 我们不再需要其他网格了。 We don't really need any of these other meshes anymore. 因此，我打算删除这些内容，以保持文件夹的干净。 So I'm just going to delete those so we can keep this folder clean. 现在，我们有了第一块隧道板，可以用来遮挡场景了。 And now we have our first tunnel piece that we can use to block out our scene. 让我们在隧道里加一个快速点光源，这样就能看到隧道里的光线了。 Let's just add in a quick point light into our tunnel so we can see the light inside of it.
items.speaker: instructor
